dvids.title: The World’s Largest Aircraft Carrier and Strike Group Return from Historic 11-Month Deployment
dvids.desc: NORFOLK, Va. — Nearly 4,500 Sailors of the Gerald R. Ford Carrier Strike Group aboard USS Gerald R. Ford (CVN 78) returned to Naval Station Norfolk the morning of May 16, following a historic and successful 11-month deployment to the U.S. 4th, 5th and 6th Fleets.
